localizations.title: Mysterium
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Look closely at the medal in the safe.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Look at the way the silverware is laid out in the kitchen.
localizations.hint_6: A message will tell you about this three-digit code. You must have made sufficient progress in your investigation to get it.
localizations.hint_7: This crudely tied safe must be opened ASAP. It seems impossible to untie the knots.
localizations.hint_9: Lead the ghost to one of the manor rooms where you will be able to communicate with him.
localizations.hint_10: An exceptional living room in more ways than one, mainly for its bookcase and Ouija board.
localizations.hint_11: The apple is associated with food, and the skulls on its peel with poison. You need to have three visions to interpret the message in full.
localizations.hint_12: You must resituate the manor rooms according to the plan (card P) and the indications of the housekeeper. The ghost's aura seems to be getting closer.
localizations.hint_15: This lion's head reminds you of something.
localizations.hint_16: Who tell you what this key opens?
localizations.hint_17: Did you notice that one of the eyes (the brown one, on the left) belongs to a woman and the other (blue) seems quite different? You need three visions to interpret the message in full.
localizations.hint_18: Two lightning bolts tear the sky with a deafening sound as you feel the ghost's oppressive gaze in the rearview mirror. You shiver but do not lose sight of these various pieces of information.
localizations.hint_19: E, I, L, W, S: the ghost points to the letters, but what is the correct order?
localizations.hint_20: In this study, you notice many things: a pink car with the number 5, a clock stuck at 3:05, a missing medal from the wall, and a strange aura.
localizations.hint_21: The knife is in bad condition: you should sharpen it.
localizations.hint_22: Did you reveal cards 13, 16, and 53? Take a good look at the medal; it should help you.
localizations.hint_23: You are looking for the number of a very close Vision card. What would be the right question to get that number?
localizations.hint_24: These white lotus flowers carry a meaningful message. You need two Visions to fully interpret this message.
localizations.hint_30: You notice a green, numbered 1 car in front of the Lion fountain.
localizations.hint_32: The soap bubbles and the purple color are the essential components of this Vision. You need a second one to interpret the message in full.
localizations.hint_36: You need to lead the ghost to the Ouija board to activate it. Follow the ghost's aura to find him.
localizations.hint_37: You need a mirror to read this message: where in this manor can you find one?
localizations.hint_40: This clock seems to be stuck at 1:20, strange!
localizations.hint_42: Thanks to this note, you know that a specific bookshelf in the living room hides the lever.
localizations.hint_43: Sweep the machine above card 43 and observe the portal.
localizations.hint_45: The layout of this slab reminds you of the layout of one of your cards. You know that the "Elemental Magic" is the key for opening. Find the logical link between both cards.
localizations.hint_46: Did you reveal cards 14, 21, and J? No hidden number(s) here.
localizations.hint_47: This Vision shows you total darkness. Has it anything to do with the night or complete lack of vision? You need two visions to interpret the message in full.
localizations.hint_48: Water and the blue color are the essential components of this Vision. You need a second one to interpret the message in full.
localizations.hint_50: In this bedroom, you notice many things: a green car with the number 3, an orange car with the number 4, a clock stuck at 2:10, and a strange aura.
localizations.hint_52: The first letters of his favorite books will tell you how to proceed.
localizations.hint_53: You need three cards OB/JEC/TS to activate the pendulum.
localizations.hint_60: A death aura hovers over this place, and you are startled by your reflection in the mirror.
localizations.hint_61: It is well-enough sharpened to cut something.
localizations.hint_63: Observe the layout of the silverware.
localizations.hint_70: Did you reveal card 90? No hidden number(s) here.
localizations.hint_80: The number 2 on the hood indicates a sequence. You need to find the remaining four cars.
localizations.hint_88: A car-shaped xylophone with colors that remind you of something. You need to find the correct sequence.
localizations.hint_97: There are three clocks in the manor. What can "smaller" and "longer" refer to?
localizations.answer_hint_7: Cut the rope around the safe (7) with the sharpened knife (61): 7+61=68.
localizations.answer_hint_9: Lead the ghost (9) to the Ouija board in the living room (10): 10+9=19.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Once the rooms are arranged in their correct formation around the pool, a green aura forms a 0.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Wipe the helmet glasses to remove the dust.
localizations.answer_hint_16: Give the key (16) to the gardener (30), the key-keeper of the manor: 16+30=46.
localizations.answer_hint_18: The lightning bolts form a 43 in the sky. The 08 you saw in the rear mirror is a mirror-reversed image and reads 80.
localizations.answer_hint_19: Enter L, E, W, I, then S in the Ouija board (machine 36). It is the nephew's name, which is mentioned on card P.
localizations.answer_hint_21: Take the knife (21) to the kitchen (40) to have it sharpened.
localizations.answer_hint_22: Put the medal (+3 blue) back on the study wall (20): 3+20=23.
localizations.answer_hint_23: You had to ask questions to find the next (very close) number: the 24.
localizations.answer_hint_36: Once the aura is recreated (card 0) and the ghost is led to the living room, he provides the letters that need to be entered into the app: LEWIS.
localizations.answer_hint_37: In the batchroom (60), place the message (37) facing the mirror: 60+37=97.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Thanks to the information on this page (42), you can find Lewis' favorite books in the living room (10):
localizations.answer_hint_43: It is a hidden number. Point the device to the card and you will see a number appear on the portal.
localizations.answer_hint_45: The marbles (card U) provide the symbols that need to be entered into the slab. Starting at the top (and proceeding clockwise), FIRE, LEAF, WATER, MOON, STAR, WIND.
localizations.answer_hint_52: Lewis' favorite books are all car-related: F, I, F, T, E, E, N.
localizations.answer_hint_53: When sweeping the pendulum above cards B, J, and N, you will see a number form by the pendulum's oscillation.
localizations.answer_hint_88: The numbers on these cars provide the sequence: 1, 2, 3, 4, then 5. Enter sequence: green, yellow, green, orange, then pink into the app.
localizations.answer_hint_97:
The clock in the kitchen (smaller hand on 1) provides the first digit of the code: 4 (longer hand on 4); that of the bedroom, provides the second: 2; and that of the study, the third: 1.
Enter code 421 in machine 6 (safe).
localizations.machine_36: At the invoking of the name of the deceased, you have a vision. But beware, you will need a second vision to interpret the ghost's message in full.
localizations.machine_45: You hear a clicking sound; the central stone is unsealed.
localizations.machine_88: As these notes resound in the room, you suddenly have a vision. It should allow you to answer to the chief superintendent.
localizations.machine_90_room_validated: "Interesting! This coincides with the last police report. Here, take it. Also, while searching the manor, I found this bizarre piece of paper among Lewis' personal effects."
localizations.machine_90_suspects_validated: Based on your indications, the chief superintendent questions the housekeeper, who confesses.
localizations.event_step_2: After you have the visions WEA/PON, you report to the chief superintendent.
localizations.event_step_3: You hear a deafening sound coming from the kitchen.
localizations.machine_36_after_88: At the invoking of the name of the deceased, you have a vision. But beware, you will need a second vision to interpret the ghost's message in full.
localizations.machine_88_before_36: As these notes resound in the room, you suddenly have a vision. It should allow you to answer to the chief superintendent.
localizations.machine_53_B_N: There is not enough esoteric energy yet.
localizations.machine_90_step_1_hint: Retrieve two visions, one by activating the Ouija board with the ghost and the other by playing the correct notes on the car-xylophone. Then, interpret them to indicate to the chief superintendent the actual crime scene.
localizations.machine_90_step_1_answer: The actual crime scene is the bathroom: tell it to the chief superintendent.
localizations.machine_90_step_2_hint: Retrieve two visions: the first one while possessed by the ghost, and the other using the pendulum over the three OBJECT cards. Interpret them, then tell the chief superintendent what weapon was used.
localizations.machine_90_step_2_answer: The nephew was drugged with sleeping pills. Let the chief superintendent know.
localizations.machine_90_step_3_hint: Retrieve three visions: the first on the knocked-over silverware, the other by wiping the dust off the glasses, and the last one by touching the Fabergé egg. Interpret them to let the chief superintendent know who you are accusing of the crime.
localizations.machine_90_step_3_answer: The housekeeper and the cook are in on it together. They are your number 1 suspects. Point them out to the chief superintendent.
localizations.machine_90_intro: Something seems off with this pool. I don't think the nephew was killed there. Can you help me find the crime scene?. I don't think the nephew was killed there. Can you help me find the crime scene?
localizations.machine_23_step_1:
Designate a player.
They take the device and press "Next."
localizations.machine_23_step_2: Careful! Don't read what follows out loud. You are possessed by the ghost. Starting now, you can no longer talk to the other players. Knock on the table to communicate with them: once to say YES, twice to say NO. Nothing else! You must have them understand that they need TO TAKE CARD 24. Press "NEXT," then give the device to another player.
localizations.machine_23_step_3: The player who has just given you the device is possessed by the ghost. He gave him a straightforward piece of information, allowing you to get a VISION card. Ask the right questions to find this card ASAP.
